item.description: In my line of work I conduct research in medical education and learning analytics. I get to apply different statistical methods to various research questions that seek to improve the quality of education at NYU School of Medicine. I am interested in the applications of Bayesian Inference, Probabilistic Modeling, and Machine Learning to these problems, but I am also intrigued by the potential applications of robust modeling practices in other areas like energy, health, and so many more that I have yet to discover.
